narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 1-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,158 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.1 percentage points.
